I've updated the `PostCard` component to implement the dynamic footer button behavior you requested. Now, instead of showing both options, it only shows the button for the alternative view (e.g., if you are editing, you see the "Comments" button; if you are viewing comments, you see the "Edit Content" button).

entries.description: Changed footer toggle to show only the alternative view action (Edit vs Comments).
